text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new year... A time when our spirits, too, are
born anew. I hear a bright and familiar voice enter
my office.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, you're here!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, for my first favor of the new year... do you
have any calligraphy paper?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I just saw that Prez and the others are decorating
the student council office with New Year's
resolutions!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I wanna make one too! Let's write ours together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And finished!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: My resolution is to beat Prez to a pulp!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: If I don't shoot my shot, I'll never surpass her!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What resolution did you make, Trainer?
choice_data_list: To have you Tei o-ver the world as its Monarch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Tei o-ver... Like take over? Well, weird pun aside,
I love it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And wow, Trainer! Your handwriting is beautiful!
Hey, switch with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She forces me to switch papers.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm gonna become a Monarch and surpass
Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...But what do I need to become Monarch
anyways?
choice_data_list:
You need the guts to keep running till the very
end!
You need a healthy body to race well!

You need some finesse to make the most of
your abilities!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, that sounds like it'll take some pretty
painful training...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I guess having guts really is important for
winning races.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll build up my guts and become a true
Monarch!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So you mean I need to rest more? I was getting so
pumped up too... Talk about anticlimactic!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I guess I can't run if I'm hurt or sick...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you've got a point. I'll make sure to take
care of my health!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm, so I need to polish my skills?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Races are more than just a battle of
who's physically the fittest.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll think up a super cool secret
technique! It'll be my hidden ace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when Tokai Teio and I are feeling satisfied
with the resolutions we've decided on...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me for intruding on your lively
conversation, but I came to wish you both a
happy new year.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Prez! Look at our New Year's resolutions!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"Tei o-ver"... Take over... Hehe. It has quite a
lovely ring to it... Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are bad jokes Prez's thing or something?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And this must be your trainer's resolution... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh? "Beat me to a pulp," you say? I'm always
willing to welcome any challenger, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sock it to her, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this is how I ring in the new year with Tokai
Teio.
